notableEvents.label: Brandon Valenzuela GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Valenzuela grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Yohendrick Piñango out at 2nd. Brandon Valenzuela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jhoan Duran. Myles Straw scores. Daulton Varsho to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Valenzuela walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Valenzuela singles on a line drive to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Daulton Varsho scores.

notableEvents.label: Edmundo Sosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa lines out to left fielder Jesús Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Valenzuela singles on a line drive to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Daulton Varsho scores.
